TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: R Čhl Čc Č
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang R Čhl Čc Č/Haising ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 574 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 521 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 53 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 65%, Rukay 1%, Cou 5%, Paywan 6%, Hla'aluwa 11%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na R Čhl Čc Č hya' ga S Čhl Čngan Č. tay 'llaw na R Čhl Čc Č hya' ga Su'aci. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč r*ńßl* ¶~ ®*/ńßais~…ēiŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi atu toweŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, rukaj *%, ¶~ ®ou *%, pajwan *%, ńßla Ēaluwa **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na r*ńßl* ¶~ ®* ńßja Ē …£a s~…ē*ńßl*Ňčan*. taj Ēllaw na r*ńßl* ¶~ ®* ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang R Čhl Čc Č/Haising ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 574 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 521 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 53 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 65%, Rukay 1%, Cou 5%, Paywan 6%, Hla'aluwa 11%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na R Čhl Čc Č hya' ga S Čhl Čngan Č. tay 'llaw na R Čhl Čc Č hya' ga Su'aci. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč r*ńßl* ¶~ ®*/ńßais~…ēiŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi atu toweŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, rukaj *%, ¶~ ®ou *%, pajwan *%, ńßla Ēaluwa **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na r*ńßl* ¶~ ®* ńßja Ē …£a s~…ē*ńßl*Ňčan*. taj Ēllaw na r*ńßl* ¶~ ®* ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
